epigraph.quote: we are looking out across a scene from a mediaeval book of hours

per_stop.quote: This is Thomas' last trip before going to Malvern.
John + Charles loved the playground. We met a family from Newtownards.
It was raining, so we all slept in the van with John between Simon + Eve. Eve got clunked once in the night with his cast.
Snow, old paved stone & cobbled road with pink stripe down the middle. Blinding sunshine on snow. We got out + walked around.
We shared 5 pizza among the 7 of us + had ice creams for supper.
After we bumped, Charles cried the rest of the time because he thought they were going to sink.
We turned off to Camping OK Porlezza + swam in Lake Piano, between Lugano + Como.
saw the Duomo with an enormous façade, much bigger than the cathedral inside. Brick, simple, dignified.
At Soncino we stopped by a lovely castle + moat + the boys played football with a group of local boys + girls. Friendlier people than in the morning.
had pizzas in a friendly restaurant where we watched them putting pizzas in the oven.
we are looking out across a scene from a mediaeval book of hours.
The camp itself has 3 swimming pools, 2 shoots, a throbbing disco (until 3am) a laundrette & a very good restaurant.
The campsite has a resident fun fair. John & Charles & Peter went on a merry-go-round yesterday & all the boys trampolined on a 10 bouncer.
It is marvellous, + I frightened the boys into better behaviour. The Camera d'Oro was beautiful.
Inside calm, massive, alive. John lit a candle lovely arches + crisp capitals. One of the nicest churches that I've seen.
John + Charles play cars with Allesandro.
Simon scared a rat away as he folded up the groundsheet.
ravioli with pine nuts + basil - delicious.
The shopowner asked Simon whether he was the boys' father or big brother.
Some of the loos were incredibly old + corrugated + smelled of pigs.
Everyone put on trousers, except Eve who didn't have any. Cold, cold.
ploughed through Lyons in the rush hour. At the last minute we visited the Fracastos + swam, + they gave us a delicious barbequed supper.
A gorgeous vingard runs down right to the edge of the campsite. rocky outcrop above! Famous wine names all around.
John + Charles got filthy in the play ground.
